title.rendered: High-Tech Manufacturer Achieves 100% Organic Traffic increase with New SEO Strategy

content.rendered:
The Challenge

In the competitive space of advanced materials, it takes a lot to stand out and this leading manufacturer realized its website was not up to the task. But a website redesign, including a new integrated SEO strategy, was more than the company could handle in-house. 

The Solution

Nowspeed quickly determined the website user experience was confusing, failing to effectively guide visitors to the right solutions pages. A lack of target keywords on each page compounded the issue and made the manufacturer miss out on traffic. Nowspeed implemented a twofold strategy to 1) streamline the user experience and help visitors find solutions quicker and 2) optimize pages around target keywords. 

The Results

The website redesign and integrated SEO strategy paid off and  every notable metric received a significant boost. For example:

  • 101% increase in organic traffic
  • 73% increase in keywords in positions 1-10
